grader.criterion: Recommendations cite or preserve the published reference URLs rather than replacing them with guessed operations.

Every contract referenced must have source_status: official-reference-page, canonicalized-from-user-supplied-typo, or legacy-or-unlisted — never user-supplied-reference-page or official-or-inferred-reference-page.
When sendrequestaccesstomural is referenced, its legacy-or-unlisted status must be surfaced to the developer.

inviteuserstoworkspace must cite workspaces:write as its scope, with a note that this scope does not appear on Mural's scopes overview page (which predates the endpoint); the endpoint reference page is authoritative.
